name: ja_current_punctuation
reference: Japanese Braille Notation 2018 (日本点字表記法, Japan Braille Committee) / braille chart (A42025 p.4)
_note: Japanese punctuation. Cells cross-checked against text sources AND the Japan Braille Committee's official braille chart (A42025 page 4, read + calibrated against the alphabet). period 。=256, comma 、=56, question ？=26, exclamation ！=235. NOTE sentence-final 。？！ technically take a two-cell gap (one cell mid-sentence); this table uses a single space_after. NOT yet included pending authoritative confirmation: brackets 「」（）, middle dot ・, dash / dotted line 棒線/点線 (their 2-3-dot patterns weren't read with confidence). Re-verify against the Japanese Braille Notation (日本点字表記法) 2018 before final.
